entry.title: SAP xP&A HXM Workforce Planning - Tutorial
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying my hands on SAP xP&A HXM Workforce Planning - Tutorial with the SAC Trial free version.  I am facing authorization issue in accessing the Application Configuration link of Overview Page. Does this tutorial need a subscription? But I didn't see any such prerequisite.  I have already raised a ticket, but no one replied yet. Could anyone help here?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema'
entry.content: HI Sishir, Even I am facing the same issue, I am Unable to select the Query using the EDMX file.It may be a product bug

entry.title: Re: CPI: use Query parameters in external API call
entry.content:
1. Allow the headers in the runtime configuration. Using a asterick to permit for all sometimes causes issues.
So maintain the name as it is like in the screenshot. The "|" comes in between.

 

 2. Now go to the content modifier>Message Header tab and create the names and values for both params.



3. Now go to the content modifier>Exchange Property tab and create the names, choose header for source type and for source value pick the corresponding value in the dropdown.

 4. Go to the target system tab and in both query params pass ${property.params} as values
and for the request headers pass the same names you allowed in the headers in the runtime configuration.
Save and deploy service @anhuhn

entry.title: Re: SAP AEM requirement and guidance
entry.content: HI Ramu,If Partner needs only one field ,May be we can use AEM-->CI(format the data based on requirement) -->partner APi call So we no need to ask him for Modification r

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content: @RMW  Thank you for your help！

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Understanding SAP Business Roles
entry.content:
Hi flpvanegas.  Thanks for the encouragement! The list of business roles for 2408 can be found in the Fiori apps library. Select filter All apps for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and then By Roles.   You can also find the list in your 2408 system using app Maintain Business Roles. 

Re FUEs - we do not license individual Fiori apps or business roles.  We license by Solution Capabilities. In some cases the same app can be used by multiple roles - however your solution capabilities may determine which use cases are relevan to the app. 
SAP Signavio Process Navigator is a good guide for which apps relate to which scenarios.

Sharath

entry.title: Re: SOLR spellcheck component StringIndexOutOfBoundsException
entry.content: 7 years later (in July 2024), the issue is still not fixed. It's actually 10 years, since the bug was reported in the Apache Jira in February 2013.

@RMW 

When editing code on JAVA GUI FOR 810, can it be completed automatically like windows GUI, instead of displaying autocomplete code by pressing the shortcut key? Sometimes the shortcut key conflicts with the shortcut key of other software

entry.title: Unable to remove version from SAC story table
entry.content:
Hi there I need to remove the version from the table entirely as I'm using a dynamic version filter that users can select to display the version amounts via restricted measures. I'm trying to create a new calculated measure that subtracts the BaseVersion from the ComparativeVersion (across multiple fields, so a simple table 'Subtract' function does not work), however since the version is coming as a required dimension, it displays the calculation in the two separate versions across two columns. I noticed that consultants who previously worked at my company were able to achieve this in a separate story, but when I try to replicate what they have done (in order to see which step is required to remove the Version), I can't seem to even replicate this. Is there something attached to the table that allows Version to be removed completely? I can't seem to see anything different, all selections and filters are the same, only that with the table I'm recreating, the version cannot be removed.

Attached are the two table design panels:

(1) The table where the version has been removed (by consultants who worked at the company in the past)

(2) The table where I'm trying to replicate (1), though I can't remove the version despite the same filtering and selection criteria. Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: How to get started in Career Corner?

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content:
Why you need to do Union or Union all?

You can perform Association between EINE and EINA tables by specifying condition on "infnr" field.

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Demo view'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view entity zcds_eine_eina as select from eine
association [0..* ] to eina as _eina on eine.infnr = _eina.infnr
{
    eine.infnr as Infnr,
    _eina.matnr as Matnr
}

You will get the result as follows ...

KhaingZin

entry.title: Re: Filtering on Association property using Table Function/AMDP (VS ABAP Virtual Elements)
entry.content:
Very Nice Blog !

Just my thoughts on table functions: One thing I have observed is that in TF, the AMDP code fetches all the data from DB since the join conditions or filters are NOT passed on to the AMDP class code.

So, if the DB tables are huge like 2-3M records, then it actually impacts the performance, since AMDP fetches all the records and then CDS View filters it based on the join conditions.

Any thoughts ?

entry.title: C4C Report data based on user(running user)
entry.content: I have a C4C report that shows all Leads converted into opportunities. I want this report to display only the data relevant to the person viewing it. For example, when a sales rep or manager views the report, they should only see the leads they have converted into opportunities. Can someone assist with setting this up?

entry.title: Re: SAP SYBASE Backup configuration
entry.content:
Hi Shan,

Using the Isql command you can create either the bat or cmd file in Windows OS, in windows OS you can use the Windows scheduler to schedule the backup of DB and truncate log everyday.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Downloading netweaver rfc sdk
entry.content:
Hi Shan,

For any downloads from the SAP portal, it is required an S-user id, to use the SAP S-user to download 

Regards

SS

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：可拓展性
entry.content:
大家好，我们即将迎来 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 大版本的更新。在本篇博客中，我将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 当中可拓展性部分的亮点更新内容。

可拓展性概览

在公有云系统中，我们提供了丰富多样的可拓展性选择，包括关键用户可拓展性、开发人员可拓展性和端到端可拓展性。在面对不同的业务需求时，我们可能需要使用可拓展性来实现。 SAP 的可拓展性那么我们应该如何找到正确的可拓展性选择呢？根据下面的图片，您可以在下面的决策图中，我们从不同的角度进行分析，让您根据自己的业务需求，找到正确的可拓展性选项。

拓展字段向导

现在，借助拓展字段向导，您可以使用开发人员可拓展性更快捷地创建拓展字段，以满足您的自定义要求。 拓展字段向导可以帮您回答哪些扩展对象是需要的，以及如何实施扩展（语法、注释等）。

拓展字段向导的适用范围包括：1.端到端的字段可拓展性。借助生成器，客户和合作伙伴可以将 RAP 业务对象从数据库表扩展到 UI 或 API OData 服务。在生成之后，生成的部件属于客户和合作伙伴，并由他们维护。但现阶段，无法使用生成器对生成的部件进行修改。同时，生成器支持一次性创建多个拓展字段。

 

大批量交付

借助开发人员可扩展性，作为客户或合作伙伴，您可以使用一次性交付进行ABAP开发。提供打包的附加产品，客户可以在其环境中安装这些产品，允许以可扩展的方式将扩展分发给大量客户。在三系统环境中使用ADT开发扩展，然后使用 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 的 Landscape Portal 打包和分发您的扩展。

定制开发可以由合作伙伴代表客户在一个独立的开发系统中执行，该系统不与客户环境连接，然后使用“Git-Enabled Change and Transport System”（gCTS）部署在客户的三系统环境中。ABAP扩展的源代码存储在远程Git存储库中，gCTS用于在SAP S/4HANA Cloud环境和Git存储库之间传输（推送和拉取）ABAP自定义代码。当传输请求的任务发布时，使用ADT在开发环境中创建提交。

entry.title: Re: Error while hybrid testing xsuaa

entry.title: Re: Difference b/w static and instance method
entry.content: It is actually helpful! Thank you.

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Business Partner and Customer Vendor Integration - Security Authorization Requirements
entry.content:
Friends, From SAP Security Authorization Perspective - for SAP S/4 HANA Business Partner and Customer Vendor Integration, please let me know: -

PART A: -

  • What are Conversion Process Authorizations Transaction Codes which would be required?
  • What are Conversion Process Authorizations Objects which would be required?
  • What are the Activate Business Functions Transaction Codes which would be required ?
  • Or any other Transaction Codes which would be required ?

PART B: -

  • What are Conversion Process Authorizations Transaction Codes which should NOT be provided directly to a Dialog User id in a Production System and Why ?  
  • What are Conversion Process Authorization Objects which should NOT be provided directly to a Dialog User id in Production System and Why ?
  • What are Activate Business Functions Transaction Codes which should NOT be provided directly to a Dialog User id in Production System and Why?

PART C: -

  • During CVI Synchronization, which of the following stages should NOT performed directly in a Production System and Why [ what is the risk?], instead should be captured in a transport and import to Production System? 
  • What are the transaction codes for which access should NOT be provided in a production system specific to CVI Synchronization? 

- Preparation

- Synchronization

- Conversion

- Post Conversion

Thanks 

Raj

entry.title: Wage Type NUM Field is not Accepting Decimals in Period Storage and Factoring
entry.content:
HCM Payroll 

@everyone

Dear Experts,

I am recently Facing an issue with period Factoring and regeneration of /801 wage type with proper values.

For 2 different absence Types I have made valuation class as Full Day Unpaid and a Half Day Unpaid absence for which Both these have a Wage type Tagged to it.

Absence Type :

1060 Full Day Absence - WT 9OUL Valuation Rule 01 Full Day | Generates 1 Day

1061 Half Day Absence - WT 9OUL Valuation Rule 03 Half Day | Generates .5 Day

Now I am trying to Push the Wage Type Generated in OT to another wage type 9HRS through PCR which is happening fine:

Placed After GEN8/ with PAR3 as NOAB

PCR:

ZLWP -  Processing:

Input Table:

PCR Processing First Split:

PCR Processing Second Split:

Output Table:

Snip of Period Factoring 

PCR: ZP1N          NOAB

Input

PCR Processing:

Part 1

Part 2

Output Table:

It is evident from the Output Table and the PCR Processing that 9HRS is only taking the value of 25 Days and not the Excess .5 Day. Whereas the Entire /801 Calculation should be on the basis of 25.50 Days.

Please look into these snips and let me know what am I missing as I have been looking at the screen and may be there is a slight change that needs to be done which I am overlooking.

PE02 PCR SNIP

The above PCR is taken as a reference from @Woody_Nguyen Thanks for this your further input would be helpful as well.

Do you know how to configure the action in that way?  i aways getting following email when i using following json 

message: "Invalid value of property 'Email Address'. The value must be a valid email address."

 

name: 'open_entity_reveiew',
                 type: 'EMAIL',
                 description: 'send email to curator',
                 state: State.ENABLED,
                 properties:{
                    "email": 'myemail@sap.com',
                    "Use HTML":true,
                    "Subject Template":'my subject',
                    "Payload Template":'my template'
                 }

entry.title: I am interested in the training programs in your company
entry.content:
Hello.
My name is Vsevolod, I came from Ukraine and am now in Germany, I received the status of Temporary Asylum.
I am interested in the training programs in your company, and I would like to continue using them, but the cost of training, exams and independent work is very high.
I have two higher educations, one of the highest universities in Ukraine. This is a recognized education of an engineer in electronic devices at the level of highways and management enterprises.

For example, I have about 30 years of experience in electronics and IT. My path began with FIDO, MS-DOS, the first x86 computers and the construction of corporate networks, an IT organization involved in a branch of a small company, setting up VoIP telephony, database servers, etc. I have basic knowledge of many programming languages, development and implementation, including SEO optimization and filling secure sites and sites for the sale of goods and services. I know the syntax of the 1C programming language, which is a competitor to SAP in the post-Soviet space. The business manager education has supplemented my skills and opportunities not only to organize business processes, but also to become a co-owner, and then a large company that operated until 2022 in Ukraine.
In SAP, I received an initial certificate of a consultant product, deployed a test local version and began to study the syntax of the ABAP language.
At the moment, I am studying German at the B1 level, which is a barrier to an internship or even minimal participation in any projects.
I have several questions:
To what extent are IT specialists and economists in demand as two in one in the field of SAP application. Apparently, this is management at the level of a project manager or department, but with extensive experience in SAP. What areas or training programs do I follow to maximize the implementation of two educations in SAP?
What bonus training programs may be available to me?
Is it possible for me to participate as an intern or trainee with my knowledge of the language?
Is it worth choosing the IT service management direction in SAP as the fastest and most effective way to enter the labor market?

I would like to apply my skills in projects, demonstrating not only the business process plane, but also the IT infrastructure, hardware with sensors and actuators, API interfaces and data conversion organization.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements : Display a Table and field group vert...
entry.content:
I came across this while looking for a solution for the same problem. As mentioned in the documentation, second level references will appear next to each other (side-by-side) so that is really the standard. But to get around that, here's how I did it just in case anyone is encounters the same problem. 

Disclaimer: I'm not sure if this goes against the Fiori Design Guidelines since I remember reading way back that using a custom CSS is discouraged. Anyway:

1. Put your Reference Facets under separate Collection Facets. Following code is a CDS annotation:

@ui.facet: [
  {
    id: 'ThisIsYourSection',
    type: #COLLECTION,
    label: 'Section'
  },
  {
    id: 'ThisIsYourFieldGroupContainer',
    parentId: 'ThisIsYourSection',
    type: #COLLECTION,
    label: 'Field Group Container',
    position: 10
  },
  {
    id: 'ThisIsYourFieldGroup',
    parentId: 'ThisIsYourFieldGroupContainer',
    purpose: #STANDARD,
    type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
    label: 'Field Group',
    targetQualifier: 'IfYouNeedAQualifier',
    position: 10
  },
  {
    id: 'ThisIsYourTableContainer',
    parentId: 'ThisIsYourSection',
    type: #COLLECTION,
    label: '', //note on the blank label, this can be omitted as well
    position: 20 //so that it appears after the field group sub section
  },
  {
    id: 'ThisIsYourTable',
    parentId: 'ThisIsYourTableContainer',
    purpose: #STANDARD,
    type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
    label: 'Table',
    targetElement: '_YourAssociation',
    position: 10
  }
]

Note that the Object Page subsection menu will show a blank item in there due to the blank label from the annotation:

If you don't want that blank area, you will need a custom CSS file in your project. As of this writing, the following CSS classes will target this menu. Note however that this is based on browser compatibility and may not work on older browsers. In the custom CSS file, include the following snippet:

.sapUiMnuItm:has(.sapUiMnuItmTxt:empty) {
    display: none !important; /* hide blank subsection menus if possible */
}

entry.title: Re: Wage Type NUM Field is not Accepting Decimals in Period Storage and Factoring
entry.content:
Hi,

Here you have information about factoring:
https://download.consolut.com/direct/SAP_PrintDoku/en/PYINT/PYINT_FACTORING.PDF 
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/half-day-unpaid-absence-calculation-in-payroll/ba-p/13437116 

In case with this you cannot manage to achieve this result you may copy the functionality and enhance it. 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Can we develop custom Adobe Forms from Scratch and De...
entry.content:
Hi @RahulJain09 

Usage of custom forms, created via Key User App "Maintain Form Templates", to render print documents via Forms service by Adobe, is currently not supported via Developer Extensibility in S/4 HANA Cloud.

Furthermore there are no options to maintain customer forms via ABAP Development Tools (ADT). Additionally, SAP standard repository for custom forms within Developer Extensibility in S/4 HANA Cloud is not available.

Note that this restriction does not apply when S/4 HANA Output Management is used. Please refer 3355397 - No support for custom form templates in S/4 HANA Cloud Developer Extensibility - SAP for Me for more details.

Please also go through KBA  3356705 - Not able to upload a custom template in Maintain Form Template App - SAP for Me where it is mentioned that currently it is not possible to access SAP standard repository for custom forms within Developer Extensibility. 

Hope this helps !

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Step by Step Guide - Running Automation Script in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Yes, I got it confirmed from this video at 22:00 minutes.

entry.title: Multiple BP Bank account - SEPA Direct Debit.
entry.content:
Hello!!

Our customer is  currently involved in a Conversion BP project as Pre Project of Migration from R3 to S4 Hana. The issue that comes up is, that once the customers and vendors are converted into BPs, there are multiple bank accounts at BP Master Data.

At least, 95% of the customer events come from Sales Orders. These customers pay by SEPA Direct Debit process. In the Sale Order we can not point the bank account to be charged by the Direct Debit and the financial invoices must be updated one by one proper bank acoount. This manual task supposes to update more than 1500 documents fortnightly.

If the bank account in the finance document is in blank, the system chooses the fisrt bank account stored is the BP master data.

Does exist a standard workaround to solve the issue that we have? 

Thank you very much for your feedback.

entry.title: Re: PS Text & Milestone Attachment Issue: Template creation of WBS & Project Definition
entry.content:
Hello @faheem4work,

Two questions:

1. I cannot see that you have created standard milestones or ps texts in your screenshot of your standard project. These would be the prerequisites for copying them when creating a new project based on your standard project.

2. If you have done this, then when creating the project please make sure you activated the checkbox beside the "with Activities" and also the components below it. In your case: "PS Texts, "Milestones" & "Documents". This applies to both, the Project Builder as well as Project Planning Board.

Please confirm you have considered these two points and send a screenshot of the whole standard structure including the milestones and ps texts.

Best regards

Paul

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I‘m Paul from Germany (Berlin) and just startet my SAP career as an SAP Solution Architect for PS/CO. Before that I’ve had 5 years of key user knowledge which showed me the great potential of SAP when utilizing it in a way that end users, customizer and developers find an overall great solution for everyone.

I am excited to meet new equally minded SAP enthusiasts, especially regarding PS/CO.

I would also love to have a Berlin community to get together and discuss about different SAP topics.

Best regards

Paul

entry.title: Re: User Status in SAP
entry.content: Great!

entry.title: Re: Deletion of COPA Documents
entry.content:
Greeting

first of all edit your customizing and transfer request 

then reverse documents via KE4S and regenerate them in KE4S again 

data will be fixed

if you want to delete use RKEDELE1  program 

best regards

Ghazal B.afshar

entry.title: Picklist Id and Number in Poeple Analytics
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a custom field configured in "Job Information" portlet as a "Picklist" type field and when we report this field via people analytics we are getting only the description on the Picklist and not the Picklist description

Could you please let me know how to report on picklist Ids in successfactors story reporting #PeopleAnalytics

Regards,
Surya

entry.title: Quel est l'ID de parrainage le plus élevé de Binance?
entry.content: Votre ID de parrainage le plus élevé de Binance est spécifié comme C15HJGN1. Lorsque vous vous inscrivez sur la bourse Binance à l'aide de ce code, vous devez écrire C15HJGN1 dans le champ « ID de parrainage » ou « Code de parrainage ». Ce code est valable à vie et offre une réduction de commission de 40 % lors de vos transactions sur Binance.

entry.title: Temu 3.000 TL Referans Kodu
entry.content: Temu'ya https://temu.to/m/u9fu1v7mn0z bu bağlantıdan kayıt olun ürün arama kısmına "dpp3976" yazın ve 3.000 TL değerinde kupon kodunu hesabınıza tanımlayın.

entry.title: Binance Code - Referral ID - 40% Discount
entry.content:
Consider using referral ID code "12312367" when creating your Binance account. This code supports a crypto enthusiast who enjoys using the platform and would be happy to help you get started. While I can't guarantee free consultancy forever, using a referral code is a great way to support other users on the platform.

Happy trading!

entry.title: Re: Duplicate ID error while working with Adaptation project
entry.content: "Duplicate id" is not always caused by one specific issue. When it comes to fragments: it depends on how the fragment is created, where it's included, and whether the application follows best practices. Please share the relevant code.

entry.title: Fiori PFCG : Table to find data for Fiori apps to Role
entry.content: i am looking for table to extract the fiori apps to role or vice versa

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the SAP Academic Board Iberoamerica members for 2025-2027!
entry.content: Felicidades a todos y que genial ver un representante de #Ecuador

entry.title: how to repeat table in adobe form's masterpage?
entry.content:
Hi guys, I am currently developing a form with Livecycle and as Adobe Livecycle has been discontinued, most of the previous links to repeat table on master page have gone into oblivion.

My form has only 1 master page and on this master page i have placed a table outside of the content area. I would expect this same table to be repeated on every  page depending on the length of the content area but the problem is, there is no data shown from page 2 onwards. Someone mentioned the table data is consumed on the first page itself, so there is nothing left for page 2 onwards. In order to solve this, they suggested to use scripting to duplicate the table for every page. 

I have tried but failed to achieve it as my scripting is not that good. Could anyone here guide me on how to do that?

Thanks

LC

entry.title: Re: Professional Services- Pre-Sales Resource Estimator
entry.content: Please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales

entry.title: Re: Issue in Installing SAP ABAP 7.52 in opensuse 15.6
entry.content: Hi, i m new to this, kindly provide any solution to fix this

entry.title: Re: adobe form
entry.content:
Hello JP,

Assuming that your query is related to India's localized invoice form templates, The recommended billing form template in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for India would be "SDBIL_CI_STANDARD_IN" (Customer Invoice Form Standard (India)).

Additionally, there are also IN localized form templates : SDBIL_CI_PROF_SRV_IN (Customer Invoice Form Professional Services (India)) & GST_INV_GLO_IN (GST Invoice Form for India)

Note - GST_INV_GLO_IN is an old template with no/limited extensibility features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. It is recommended to use SDBIL_CI_STANDARD_IN instead.

Moreover, you can also use app 'Maintain Form Templates' to find all pre-delivered form templates, additionally use filter 'Available Countries/regions' and search with your region of choice to list out all pre-delivered/standard form templates localized for that particular country/region.

Please use either of the above standard form template and its datasource in order to create Custom Form Templates.

Please find additional resources that you might find helpful:

SAP Help Portal | Extensibility for Output Forms and Email Templates of Billing Documents

2679030 - Extensibility for Billing Document Printout - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Best Regards,

Rajprit

entry.title: Re: C4C Report data based on user(running user)
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/sap-cloud-for-customer-security-guide/sales-recommended-rules-for-authorization-restrictions?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Poland - Sales billing
entry.content: Added SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales

entry.title: Re: C4C Report data based on user(running user)

entry.title: Re: API/BOI for VL10B
entry.content: Please remove all other tags except 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Supply Chain'

entry.title: Re: Capacity Planning CDS
entry.content:
Hi Lalith,

Could you kindly clarify your question or requirement?

What do you mean the CDS View can take?

Usually CDS Views are used for reporting/analytics or export of data. For example you can expose a CDS View as OData service, but they are read only, not for writing.

Please find the help link for Work Center Capacity CDS View: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/c2bbd25bd6964364883fa0503d18f07a.html?locale=en-US

In that same area of the help, you will find all the CDS Views for the Work Center basic data, as well as the available CDS Views for Production Planning -> Capacity Planning, etc.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Assing Cost Centers - OVF3 - Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Nicolas,

The configuration you have mentioned (similar to OVF3) for assignment of Cost centers to Order reason codes is not available as a front-end configuration activity/SSCUI. It's not designed to be exposed to end users in S/4HANA Cloud.

In order to change this behavior you will be required to submit a feature request, alternatively you may engage with the customer's SAP representative regarding this instance.

Please check KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product. 

Best Regards,

Rajprit

entry.title: Re: Export and Import Feature of SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi @ukinguva - Yes TIH users can import the Skillsplex library, no dependency as such. Though it is advised to review those skills first (as you will get the .csv file from API Hub to load into TIH) with customer and then import the relevant skills only, since in TIH we can't delete skills, but only make them inactive.

Regards

Ujjal

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition subscriptions fails in US based BTP trial account.

entry.title: Application Server details in the System Information area
entry.content:
Dear Support,

On the right side of the SAPGUI screen, there is a list of SIDs, clients, user names, etc. that can be checked, and depending on the user, the application server name may or may not be in the list.

It was checked the SAP Logonpad options, registry, etc. but could not find the cause. Are there any SAP notes, SAP help, or documentation that has information about this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Application Server details in the System Information...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to SAP Technical Support.

The Application Server information was removed as explained in the SAP Note 2565051 - Application Server Information not displayed in Belize Theme:

In the Belize theme the system information section in SAP GUI for Windows which used to be in the lower right corner has been moved into the upper right corner of the SAP GUI window and three changes have been applied intentionally:

  • The field for the application server name has been removed
  • The field for INS / OVR (Insert / Overwrite) has been removed
  • The icon for the "Local Tab Chain" has been removed

The information about the application server you are connected to can be displayed in the system information section in Belize theme as of the SAP GUI for Windows 7.50 SP004.

On 64bit operating systems when runinng a 32bit version of SAP GUI for Windows:
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Customize\StatusShowModeBelize (REG_DWORD)

On 32bit operating systems and 64bit operating systems when runinng a 64bit version of SAP GUI for Windows:
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Customize\StatusShowModeBelize (REG_DWORD)

To display the application server by default you can change the value to "1".

entry.title: Re: Grouping Z001 has not been assigned to any customer accounts group.
entry.content: how it resolved? me getting same error even customer account group assigned

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Here's my submission.

Big thanks to @sudarshan_b, I ran into the very same problem and fixed it by adding an alias. The BTP application log was helpful here, but the error "❗️Uncaught Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'ProductName')" was not really pointing me to search for the error at the SELECT count(*).

entry.title: Re: Issue in Installing SAP ABAP 7.52 in opensuse 15.6
entry.content: You didn't explain what ABAP 7.52 you have installed, what procedure you have followed, what is your operating system and so on. The error message: "CJS-00030 This tool does not support the database server version 15.7.0.000." Lots of SAP notes mention the error code CJS-00030.

entry.title: Re: How to connect PostgreSQL database in crystal report
entry.content:
Firstly be sure to use the latest SP for CR for VS SP 36 from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Create the report first in CR Designer, then simple set the logon info in code.

Here's the info to connect to Postgress DB's:

PostgreSQLPostgreSQL (21)9.6ODBC  PostgreSQL 9.6 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   PostgreSQL 42.1 JDBC End of Support
10ODBC  PostgreSQL 10 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   PostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC End of Support
11ODBC NewPostgreSQL 11 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC  NewPostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC End of Support
12ODBC BI 4.3 SP01+PostgreSQL 12 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP01+PostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC Direct
13ODBC BI 4.3 SP02+PostgreSQL 13 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP02+PostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC Direct
14ODBC BI 4.3 SP03+PostgreSQL 13 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP03+PostgreSQL 42.3 JDBC Direct
15ODBC BI 4.3 SP04+PostgreSQL 13 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP04+PostgreSQL 42.3 JDBC Direct
Progress SoftwareProgress OpenEdge11.3ODBC  OpenEdge 11.3B ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   OpenEdge 11.3B JDBC  End of Support
11.6ODBC  OpenEdge 11.6 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   OpenEdge 11.6 JDBC  End of Support
12ODBC BI 4.3 SP01+DataDirect ODBC Driver for OpenEdge 7.1.6  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP01+DataDirect JDBC Driver for OpenEdge 5.1.4  Direct

entry.title: Re: Connection info update in crystal reports with oracle...
entry.content:
Check out the test app I wrote and use ReplaceConnection() API to update to the new server:

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Also, upgrade to SP 36, always keep up to date for security updates and DB Client updates.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html
